sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Primis Financial Corp Operating Profits Surge 126 Percent in First Quarter
feed.summary: Primis Financial Corp (NASDAQ:FRST) reported a first-quarter net income of $7.3 million, or $0.30 per share, for 2026, a decrease from the previous year due to one-time gains in 2025. Despite this, the company's operating profits surged by 126% year-over-year, reaching $0.33 per share on an operating basis. Primis saw significant improvement in its net interest income and margin, balance sheet growth, and expanding mortgage warehouse business, and remains on track to meet its 2026 profitability targets.

feed.title: Fifth Third’s Bill Adams joins Auto Finance Summit East 2026
feed.summary: Bill Adams, chief U.S. economist at Fifth Third Bank, will deliver a macroeconomic and automotive industry outlook at Auto Finance Summit East 2026. His presentation will cover interest rate cycles, GDP growth, SAAR forecasts, pricing dynamics, and economic headwinds facing auto finance. The summit aims to bring together industry leaders to discuss trends and technological advancements in auto finance.

feed.title: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) CFO Trent Thad Sells 30,000 Shares
feed.summary: ON Semiconductor (NASDAQ:ON) CFO Trent Thad sold 30,000 shares of the company's stock on April 23rd at an average price of $93, totaling $2.79 million. Following this sale, which was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, Thad now owns 301,194 shares. The article notes the company's collaboration with NIO on 900V EV platforms and tailwinds from industrial/automotive chips, but also highlights a recent revenue decrease, thin margins, and a high trailing P/E ratio, leading to a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts.

feed.title: ROYAL CARIBBEAN GROUP CONFIRMS ORDER WITH MEYER TURKU FOR ICON 6 AND 7
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has confirmed an order with Meyer Turku for a sixth and seventh Icon Class ship, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030, respectively. This order is part of a long-term agreement with Meyer Turku, securing shipbuilding capacity through 2036 and further extending the economic impact to Finland. The collaboration highlights a continued commitment to innovation in cruise ship design, expanding Royal Caribbean's Icon Class fleet which includes Icon of the Seas and Star of the Seas already delivered, and Legend of the Seas and Hero of the Seas upcoming.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean locks in two more Icon ships, stretching builds to 2030
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE: RCL) has confirmed orders with Meyer Turku for two additional Icon Class ships, Icon 6 and Icon 7, scheduled for delivery in 2029 and 2030, respectively. This extends their shipbuilding framework through 2036, following the previously announced Icon 5 for 2028. The Icon 7 order is contingent on customary conditions, including financing, but reinforces the company's strategy for large, next-generation vessels and continued investment in the Finnish maritime industry.

feed.title: [PUBLISH BETWEEN: 4/24 - 5/7] Make Mother's Day Sweeter With These 9 Hershey's Chocolate Gifts
feed.summary: This article suggests nine Hershey's chocolate gifts to make Mother's Day special. Options range from personalized chocolate bars and a mixed bag of candies to an enormous Hershey's Kiss and chocolate-covered nuts or caramels. The piece emphasizes that chocolate offers a sweet treat and a moment of rest for busy moms.

feed.title: LSB Industries Grants Retention RSUs to CEO Behrman
feed.summary: LSB Industries (LXU) granted CEO Mark Behrman 706,880 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 24, 2026, as a one-time retention incentive. These RSUs vest in 2029, with provisions for accelerated vesting under specific conditions, aiming to align Behrman's interests with shareholders and ensure his continued leadership. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates LXU as Neutral, citing improving fundamentals balanced against cyclicality and current valuation.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines Marks America’s 250th Anniversary with ‘Independence One’ – A Tribute to U.S. History and Patriotism
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines is celebrating America's 250th anniversary by introducing "Independence One," a new aircraft livery designed in patriotic red, white, and blue, featuring symbols like 13 stars and the phrase "life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness." This aircraft joins "Freedom One" and "Liberty One" in honoring the nation's history and values. Additionally, Southwest has partnered with America250 as the official airline of "America Gives," pledging up to $250,000 to support volunteerism.

feed.title: Ramaco Resources Inc (METC) Stock Up 5.1% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 78/100
feed.summary: Ramaco Resources Inc (METC) stock rose 5.1% to $14.49, significantly above its GF Value™ of $8.64, indicating a 67.7% overvaluation. The company has an Above Average GF Score™ of 78/100, driven by strong growth and profitability, but its financial strength and valuation are weak. Insiders have sold $29.6 million worth of stock in the last three months with no purchases, signaling a potential lack of confidence.

feed.title: A Look at Humana Inc (HUM) After 3.9% Gain -- GF Value $434.36 v
feed.summary: Humana Inc (HUM) shares rose 3.9% but are down over the past year. Despite recent gains, the stock is considered significantly undervalued by GuruFocus' GF Value, trading 48.5% below its intrinsic value estimate of $434.36. Insider buying activity suggests confidence in the company's future, though its P/E ratio is trading above its 5-year median, and its Valuation and Momentum scores are low.

feed.title: Insider Selling: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) SVP Sells 306 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: United Rentals (NYSE:URI) SVP Joli Gross sold 306 shares of company stock for over $292,000, reducing her holdings by 5.06%. Despite the miss, United Rentals announced a $5.0 billion share buyback and a quarterly dividend of $1.97 per share.

feed.title: Craig Adam Pintoff Sells 2,466 Shares of United Rentals (NYSE:URI) Stock
feed.summary: Craig Adam Pintoff, EVP of United Rentals (NYSE:URI), sold 2,466 shares of the company's stock for over $2.37 million, reducing his stake by 14.3%. This insider sale occurred as United Rentals missed its quarterly earnings estimates and saw its stock trade down by 1.5%. The company recently announced a $5.0 billion share buyback program and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.97.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) VP Sells 18,189 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) VP Shanon Leonard sold 18,189 shares of the company's stock on April 24th for over $5 million, reducing her holding by 36.26%. This sale follows the company's strong Q1 earnings report which beat analyst estimates and solid Q2 guidance, leading to multiple analyst price target upgrades. Despite the insider selling, the stock maintains a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $257.68, and the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) VP Sells $5,003,176.95 in Stock
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (NASDAQ:TXN) VP Amichai Ron sold 18,365 shares of the company's stock for over $5 million, reducing his stake by 18.47%. This comes as the company reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings and provided upbeat Q2 2026 guidance, alongside declaring a quarterly dividend of $1.42 per share. Analyst ratings remain mixed, with a consensus "Hold" despite several price target increases following the positive earnings report.

feed.title: Waters Corp. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Waters Corp. stock (WAT) fell 3.25% to $299.79 on Monday, marking its fifth consecutive day of losses. This underperformance occurred on a mixed trading day, with the S&P 500 Index (SPX) seeing a slight gain and the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJIA) experiencing a small decline.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) director Mortimer Buckley granted 7,686 phantom stock units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. director Mortimer J. Buckley was granted 7,686.539 phantom stock units as deferred compensation, increasing his total phantom units to 24,391.124. These units, valued at $26.67 each, are part of the company's Nonfunded Deferred Compensation and Unit Award Plan for Non-Employee Directors and will be settled in cash or common stock upon his retirement. This transaction is considered a moderate impact with a neutral sentiment, reflecting a compensation award rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: AT&T (T) – Among the 10 Best Fortune 500 Dividend Stocks to Invest in Right Now
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) is highlighted as one of the top Fortune 500 dividend stocks to invest in, boasting a 4.24% annual dividend yield. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q1 2026 results, exceeding earnings and revenue estimates and adding more wireless subscribers by bundling services. Despite a slight price target reduction by Scotiabank, the firm maintains a 'Sector Perform' rating, citing strong execution and achievable decommissioning goals, with an outlook for significant free cash flow for the remainder of 2026.

feed.title: Is Pfizer (PFE) One of the Best Fortune 500 Dividend Stocks to Invest in Right Now?
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (PFE) is highlighted as one of the best Fortune 500 dividend stocks, boasting an annual dividend yield of 6.37%. The company recently declared its 350th consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.43 per share and aims for full-year revenue between $59.5 billion and $62.5 billion for 2026. While acknowledging Pfizer's investment potential, the article suggests that some AI stocks might offer higher returns in a shorter timeframe.

feed.title: Chipotle hires Fernando Machado as chief brand officer
feed.summary: Chipotle has announced the hiring of Fernando Machado as its new chief brand officer, effective June. This strategic move highlights Chipotle's increased focus on brand-building to support its growth strategy and global expansion plans. Machado, an experienced marketer in the CPG and restaurant sectors, is expected to drive significant brand initiatives for the company.

feed.title: Huawei Named a Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Second Year in a Row
feed.summary: Huawei has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer for Backup and Data Protection Platforms for the second consecutive year. This honor is based on a 100% willingness-to-recommend rating for its OceanProtect Data Protection product from 241 reviews and an overall rating of 4.9 out of 5.0, reflecting global customer trust in its comprehensive competitiveness and service quality. Song Ke, President of Huawei Data Protection Domain, emphasized the company's commitment to continued product innovation and customer-centric end-to-end data protection solutions.

feed.title: The Mosaic Co (MOS) Shares Fall 3.2% -- What GF Score of 69 Tells Investors
feed.summary: The Mosaic Co (MOS) saw its shares fall 3.2% to $23.22, marking a 17.8% decline over the past year. Despite being 21.0% undervalued according to the GF Value™ estimate of $29.39, the stock's P/E ratio is higher than its historical median, suggesting a premium valuation. The company holds a GF Score™ of 69/100, indicating above-average performance potential, with strong valuation but weak growth prospects.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Arista Networks (ANET) After Its 120% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Arista Networks (ANET) after its significant 120% surge over the past year, questioning if it's still a valuable investment. Using Discounted Cash Flow and P/E ratio analyses, it suggests ANET is currently overvalued. The article also presents "Bull Case" and "Bear Case" narratives with varying fair value estimates, highlighting the impact of different growth assumptions and market risks.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reassess Honeywell (HON) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
feed.summary: This article evaluates Honeywell International (HON) following a recent share price pullback, noting a 7.7% decline over 7 days and a 5.0% decline over 30 days, despite positive longer-term returns. Using Discounted Cash Flow and Price vs Earnings analyses, Simply Wall St suggests HON is currently "about right" in valuation based on DCF and slightly "undervalued" based on the P/E ratio relative to its proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article also presents bullish and bearish narratives with different intrinsic value conclusions, encouraging investors to use these tools to form their own assessments.

feed.title: Kforce Q1 2026 Earnings Call: Complete Transcript
feed.summary: Kforce Inc. announced Q1 2026 revenues of $330.4 million, marking its first year-over-year growth since Q4 2022, with EPS of $0.46 exceeding expectations. The company projects mid-single-digit revenue growth for Q2, driven by increased demand for flexible workforce solutions and AI-related projects. Kforce is expanding its India Development Center and establishing AI Innovation Studio/AI pods, while strong execution in pricing and service delivery has led to higher gross margins and operating leverage.

feed.title: Avery Dennison takes $75 million stake in Wiliot
feed.summary: Avery Dennison has made a $75 million minority investment in Wiliot, a provider of passive Bluetooth low-energy (BLE) sensors for supply chain inventory visibility. This investment builds on prior collaborations related to Walmart's use of RFID and ambient IoT sensors. The partnership aims to expand the adoption of digital identities on physical items, combining RFID and BLE technologies to provide broader solutions for visibility and condition monitoring across industries like retail, logistics, and food.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt (NASDAQ: JBHT) director gets 1,359-share stock award
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt (NASDAQ: JBHT) director James L. Robo was awarded 1,359 shares of common stock as an annual retainer, valued at $253.71 per share. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 42,257 shares, with an additional 75,431 shares held indirectly through a grantor retained annuity trust. The filing also noted a transfer of 38,304 shares from the trust to Robo in March 2026.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE: PFE) director receives phantom stock compensation award
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. director James C. Smith was granted 7,686.539 Phantom Stock Units as deferred compensation, valued at $26.67 per unit. These units, which track Pfizer's common stock, are part of the company's Nonfunded Deferred Compensation and Unit Award Plan for Non-Employee Directors. After this transaction, Smith holds a total of 178,111.302 Phantom Stock Units, to be settled in cash or stock upon his retirement from the board.

feed.title: Former Target Legal Chief’s Severance Package Exceeds $5 Million
feed.summary: Target Corp.'s former legal chief, Amy Tu, received $5.8 million in compensation in the year she was fired. This includes a nearly $1 million initial severance payment, with a total severance package valued at $5.3 million to be paid over two years. Tu's 2025 compensation also encompassed a pro-rated base salary and $4.5 million in stock awards.

feed.title: APO 4-DAY DEADLINE ALERT: Hagens Berman Alerts Apollo Global Management (APO) Investors to Securities Class Action Stemming From "Epstein Files" Revelations
feed.summary: Hagens Berman has alerted investors of Apollo Global Management (APO) to a securities class action lawsuit following "Epstein Files" revelations. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo and its executives made false statements regarding the firm's relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, causing a significant drop in Apollo's stock price. Investors who suffered losses between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm by May 1, 2026, to discuss lead plaintiff opportunities.

feed.title: GraniteShares YieldBOOST SPY ETF declares $0.1917 dividend
feed.summary: GraniteShares YieldBOOST SPY ETF has declared a monthly dividend of $0.1917 per share. The dividend has an ex-date of May 1, 2026, and a payable date of May 8, 2026. This announcement provides key financial details for investors interested in the ETF's distributions.

feed.title: Brown & Brown reports flat organic growth for Q1
feed.summary: Insurance broker Brown & Brown reported flat organic revenue growth for the first quarter of 2026. Retail organic growth increased by 1%, while specialty distribution saw a 2% rise.

feed.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) Shares Down 3.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) shares dropped 3.1% on Monday with lower-than-average trading volume despite several analysts raising their price targets and the company beating fiscal-quarter earnings estimates. The semiconductor company reported $1.47 EPS against an expected $1.36 and $5.84 billion in revenue, a 23.8% year-over-year increase, and provided Q4 2026 EPS guidance of $1.50–1.80. Several company insiders have sold shares recently, and institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Is Kilroy Realty (KRC) 4.4% Undervalued After Q1? EPS $(0.16) vs Est $0.14 (Miss); Revenue $270.1M vs Est $266.99M (Beat) -- GF Score 69/100
feed.summary: Kilroy Realty (KRC) reported Q1 2026 results with revenue beating estimates, but GAAP diluted EPS missing expectations due to a non-cash impairment charge. Despite a GAAP net loss, the company showed strong leasing activity, significant capital recycling through asset sales, and share repurchases. KRC also updated its full-year 2026 FFO guidance upwards, reflecting improved occupancy assumptions and interest expense.

feed.title: Former Target CEO Brian Cornell Scores $21.8M Pay Package in Final Year in the Corner Office
feed.summary: Former Target CEO Brian Cornell received a compensation package of $21.8 million in his final year, marking a 7% increase. Most of his pay came from stock awards, with his total compensation being scrutinized by shareholders who desire greater board independence. Shareholders will vote on a proposal for an independent board chair at the company's annual meeting in June.

feed.title: Cummins makes donation to Rose-Hulman for hands-on learning
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. recently donated an ISB 6.7L engine to Rose-Hulman Institute of Technology. This donation will provide students with valuable hands-on learning experience, specifically for the school’s Internal Combustion Engines course.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories EVP and CFO Philip Boudreau buys $201,300 in stock
feed.summary: Philip P. Boudreau, EVP and CFO of Abbott Laboratories, recently increased his indirect holdings by purchasing 2,200 common shares for $91.50 per share, totaling $201,300, and also acquired 8,909 shares through a profit-sharing trust. These insider purchases occurred as Abbott's stock traded near its 52-week low. Analysts have adjusted price targets for Abbott following its Q1 results, which showed mixed performance with some segments missing expectations.

feed.title: A Look At Assurant (AIZ) Valuation As Analyst Optimism Builds Around Upcoming Earnings
feed.summary: Analyst optimism is growing for Assurant (AIZ) ahead of its upcoming earnings report, driven by strong performance in its Global Housing and Lifestyle segments. With the stock trading at a discount to analyst targets and intrinsic value estimates, the article explores whether there's still significant upside despite its current P/E ratio being higher than the industry average. It highlights both opportunities from device protection growth and risks like regulatory challenges and competitor pressure.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) Shares Up 1.1% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) shares rose 1.1% during midday trading on Monday, reaching $311.74 with a market capitalization near $836 billion. The bank recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $5.94 EPS on $50.54 billion in revenue. Despite recent insider share sales, the company declared a $1.50 quarterly dividend and was involved in significant corporate developments, including a $6 billion financing deal for Kuwait's oil pipeline and a partnership to combat payments fraud.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Stock Price Down 1.3% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) stock declined 1.3% to $66 in mid-day trading with below-average volume. Analysts have a "Hold" rating with an average target of $65.88, indicating limited upside. Despite a 6.4% dividend yield, the 103% payout ratio raises sustainability concerns, and Q1 expectations are for modest growth amid persistent declines in smokeable product volumes.

feed.title: United Rentals SVP Joli Gross sells $292k in company stock By Investing.com

Following this transaction, Ms. Gross directly holds 5,737.816 shares. The company's stock currently trades above its InvestingPro Fair Value, placing it on the platform’s Most Overvalued list, despite several analysts raising their price targets due to strong Q1 performance.

feed.title: Hershey Trust, 10% owner, sells $3.8m of HSY common stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Hershey Trust Co., a significant shareholder and 10% owner of The Hershey Company (HSY), recently sold 19,000 shares of common stock across multiple transactions on April 23 and 24, 2026, totaling approximately $3.84 million. Despite the sales, the trust maintains substantial direct and indirect holdings, including 54,612,012 shares of convertible Class B Common Stock. This insider transaction comes amid other recent news for Hershey, including a leadership change, analyst rating adjustments due to rising cocoa costs, and a broader industry trend of reducing promotional spending to manage margin pressures.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories EVP and CFO Philip Boudreau buys $201,300 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories EVP and CFO Philip Boudreau recently increased his indirect holdings in the company's common stock, with his spouse purchasing 2,200 shares for $201,300 and Mr. Boudreau acquiring an additional 8,909 shares through a profit-sharing trust. These insider purchases occur as Abbott's stock trades near its 52-week low, and InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently undervalued. The transactions follow Abbott's Q1 results, which led to several analyst firms adjusting their price targets due to mixed performance.

Despite the dip, some analysts view the stock as a buying opportunity due to strong free cash flow projections, undervalued AI/quantum potential, and its status as a dividend aristocrat. The company recently reported better-than-expected Q1 earnings, with revenue up 9.5% year-over-year, and increased its quarterly dividend.

Potential growth drivers include new advertising initiatives and partnerships, but regulatory risks and recent insider selling are acting as headwinds.

feed.title: Fastenal director exercises options for 1,000 shares | FAST Insider Trading
feed.summary: Fastenal director Michael J. Ancius exercised a stock option for 1,000 shares of common stock at an exercise price of $13.75 per share, with the transaction reported at $44.90 per share. Following this, he directly holds 58,690 common shares and 13,008 shares indirectly through a 401(k) plan, while retaining 10,448 stock options. This transaction was filed as a Form 4, detailing his beneficial ownership changes.

feed.title: Celcuity Breast Cancer Drug Receives FDA Priority Review for 2026
feed.summary: The FDA has granted Priority Review for Celcuity Inc.'s lead breast cancer drug candidate, gedatolisib, with a PDUFA goal date of July 2026. Clinical data for gedatolisib, used in a triplet therapy for HR+/HER2- advanced breast cancer, showed a significant reduction in the risk of disease progression or death by 76% and a median progression-free survival of 9.3 months compared to 2.0 months for standard treatment. The biopharmaceutical firm is now preparing for commercial operations, expanding staff and securing additional financing.

feed.title: Waste Management Stocks Worth Watching - April 27th
feed.summary: MarketBeat has identified Waste Management (WM), GFL Environmental (GFL), and Custom Truck One Source (CTOS) as top waste management stocks to watch, based on recent high dollar trading volumes. These companies operate in the defensive waste management sector, characterized by steady cash flows, dividends, and long-term municipal contracts. The sector's performance is influenced by waste volumes, commodity prices for recyclables, and environmental regulations.

feed.title: Howard Hughes Holdings (HHH): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
feed.summary: Howard Hughes Holdings (HHH) has seen a significant stock price drop of 21.3% over the last six months, partly due to softer quarterly results. Analysts express low confidence in the company, citing disappointing long-term revenue growth, although ROIC has jumped. Concerns are also raised about the company's high debt levels, with $5.12 billion in debt exceeding $2.10 billion cash on hand and a 6x net-debt-to-EBITDA ratio, leading to a recommendation to avoid the stock for now.
